articles.title: Early humans were bringing fire into caves 1.8 million years ago
articles.summary: A new study suggests early humans were using fire in South Africa’s Wonderwerk Cave as far back as 1.79 million years ago. articles.summary: A hidden population of South African leopards has revealed a remarkable evolutionary story.
